title: This Should Be Your Favorite Olympic Sport
description:
This is your new favorite Winter Olympic Sport! #sponsored @NBCSports @YouTube #winterolympics 

Every 4 years the internet collectively loses its mind over one Olympic Sport: Curling. 

People make fun of it! There are endless jokes about cleaning and even comments questioning if it’s even a sport... 

I get it. Between the screaming and the sweeping and the general ethos, it looks kind of crazy but I promise you… this is one Olympic sport you don’t want to miss. 

Here’s how to watch it! #ice #curling #shorts
